title: Oh The Frames(OTF)
description:
If you are playing Minecraft on a pc that is not good at all and are tired of getting around 20-30 fps, this is the best modpack for you, designed for low-end pcs that cant run the minecraft properly

Please join the discord and say if u like the modpack
body:
specially designed for intermediate or bad PCs that have difficulty running Minecraft correctly and only show bad fps, crashes, lag etc...

Our modpack grants you to have a 100% better experience playing Minecraft by manipulating the game to give a crazy impression of high fps along with huge optimization making your game go from 60 fps to 180-200! !NEVER CHANGE THE MODS CONFIGS, VSYNC, MAX FRAMERATE! ( I highly recommend you dont change the settings at all and play with the included shader)
